prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.help.title: Prompt Help
prompts.help.intro: Variables in the user prompt template are replaced with current workflow data before the model call.
prompts.help.variables.title: Variables available for this purpose:
prompts.help.variable.target_characters: Target character list, usually one or more character names.
prompts.help.variable.chunk_text: Source material text read for this extraction chunk.
prompts.help.variable.character: Target character currently being generated or checked.
prompts.help.variable.evidence_chunk: New evidence chunk used to update the character state.
prompts.help.variable.character_state: Character state JSON waiting for final consistency checks.
prompts.help.note.title: Notes:
prompts.help.note.braces: Keep variables wrapped in English braces, for example {character}.
prompts.help.note.blank: If you leave the prompt blank or restore default, the built-in default prompt will be used.
prompts.save.success.title: Prompt saved
prompts.save.success.content: Blank content or text matching the default will continue to use the default prompt.
prompts.restore.success.title: Default restored
prompts.restore.success.content: This purpose will use the built-in default prompt again.
settings.title: Settings
settings.theme.changed.title: Theme updated
settings.theme.changed.content: The interface theme has been applied.
settings.language.changed.title: Language updated
settings.language.changed.content: The new language will fully apply next time you start the app; new prompts and flows will use the current choice first.
about.title: About
about.description: A small desktop helper that gathers reusable character insights from anime, manga, video, images, and text sources into tidy little drawers.
about.notice.title: Notices
about.notice.legalMaterial: Only import materials you have the right to use.
about.notice.review: AI-generated content should be reviewed and is not official canon or verified fact.
about.notice.copyright: Characters, titles, and related materials belong to their respective rights holders.
about.notice.thirdParty: Third-party libraries are governed by their own open-source licenses.
about.links.title: Links
insight.empty: Click "Start Preview" and CharaPicker will place key findings here one by one.
insightsPage.title: Insight Brook
extractor.config.title: Opening project config
extractor.chunk.title: Sampling tiny chunks
extractor.chunk.description: Preview run reads the first 2 chunks to check prompt and evidence quality.
extractor.insight.title: Waiting for targeted insights
extractor.insight.description: After AI integration, CharaPicker will write key findings to knowledge_base/targeted_insights.json.
